representation_context: synthetic illustration representing a cultural community for educational storytelling
notes: Escalate. Synthetic cultural representation has high stereotype, fabrication, provenance, evidence-confusion, and weak human-review risk.

representation_context: nonprofit campaign portraying community need through beneficiary narrative
notes: Escalate. Story risks dignity loss, weak agency, power asymmetry, exposure, and unclear benefit to represented people.
